column2: fighb <- ggplot(df_hb, aes(x = 词类, y = as.numeric(可能性)))+
geom_half_violin(data = ~ subset(.x, 词类 == "趋向动补"),
aes(color = 词类), size = 1, side = "l", alpha = 0.8)+
geom_half_violin(data = ~ subset(.x, 词类 == "结果动补"),
aes(color = 词类), size = 1, side = "r", alpha = 0.8)+
geom_jitter(aes(color = 词类, fill = 词类), alpha = 0.9, size = 4, pch = 21, width = 0.02)+
labs(y = "句法协同强度", x = NULL)+
facet_wrap(~ 组别, nrow = 1, labeller = labeller(组别 = c("TDC" = "典型儿童",  "ASD" = "孤独症儿童"))) +
